trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: extend `/api/admin/mentor-assignments` with admin-only listing and audited deactivation so admin provisioning can manage mentor assignment lifecycle without direct DB edits.
scope: Implement GET list and DELETE deactivate handlers for `/api/admin/mentor-assignments` (admin-only) and add deterministic integration coverage for the full assignment lifecycle (list + activate/upsert + deactivate), including audit-event assertions.
changes: Extended `/api/admin/mentor-assignments` with admin-only listing (GET) for active assignments by default, optional includeInactive support, and stable payload fields suitable for an admin UI.
Added `/api/admin/mentor-assignments` deactivation (DELETE) that flips the active flag, is idempotent, and writes audit events for successful and duplicate deactivation attempts.
Expanded deterministic integration coverage for list and deactivation behavior plus audit-event assertions.
known_limits: Admin mentor assignment list currently returns ids + display names only; follow-on work should define the minimal admin UI surface that consumes this endpoint.
Teacher assignment and role assignment management endpoints remain separate follow-on slices.
next_actions: Add admin endpoints for teacher assignments and role-scope changes with audit coverage.
Build a minimal admin UI surface for viewing and managing mentor/teacher assignments without exposing misc-admin broad access.
